title: Senior Doctor - CMC Vellore Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - CMC Vellore Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? CMC Vellore Capital India in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CMC Vellore Capital India:
CMC Vellore Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
